name: cisco_secure_firewall
explanation: Cisco Secure Firewall is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec defines only a `logs` template (tcp/udp syslog) and there is no Agent check class under `datadog_checks/cisco_secure_firewall/` (no <name>.py implementation). Enabling the integration is purely a question of whether the user routes ASA/FTD syslog to a port the Agent listens on; there is no metric endpoint to probe and no host/port the Agent can autodiscover from the wire. The user must also know which TCP/UDP port their firewall is configured to ship syslog to.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only / instrumentation-only). No check.py exists; integration is a logs config + manifest only.
